These colours are used for individual highlighted words within sentences and headings across the site.

settings.label: Default keyword highlight colour
settings.info: Applied to italic or emphasised words in headings e.g. 'We rewriting *date night*'

settings.label: Secondary keyword highlight colour
settings.info: Alternative highlight — used via Liquid snippet as needed

settings.label: Tertiary keyword highlight colour
settings.info: Gold light variant for subtle emphasis

settings.label: Custom background colour override
settings.info: Overrides style selector above if set

settings.label: Announcement message
settings.default: ✦ New Drop: The Velvet Hour — Limited to 200 kits.

settings.label: Countdown end date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
settings.info: Leave blank to hide

settings.label: Footer brand tagline
settings.default: Rewriting how couples do date night. Novel sensory products, monthly drops and immersive events for modern relationships.

settings.label: Newsletter subtext
settings.default: New drops, exclusive events and date night inspiration — straight to your inbox.

settings.label: Copyright text
settings.default: © 2025 Playmate Labs Ltd. All rights reserved.

settings.label: Empty cart subtext
settings.default: Start with our latest drop — limited kits available.

settings.label: Popup body copy
settings.default: Join 14,000+ couples and unlock our free 5-day sensory experience — daily emails, ritual guides and curated playlists delivered to your inbox.

settings.label: Below-form disclaimer text
settings.default: No credit card. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

settings.label: Klaviyo Public API Key (Site ID)
settings.info: Find this in Klaviyo → Account → Settings → API Keys. Starts with a 6-character public key e.g. 'AbCd12'.

settings.label: Klaviyo List ID — Popup signups
settings.info: The List ID from Klaviyo → Lists & Segments → [your list] → Settings. e.g. 'XyZ123'. Leave blank to use Shopify contact form fallback.

settings.label: Klaviyo List ID — 5-Day Experience signups
settings.info: Separate list for the free experience signups so you can send the 5-day email sequence. Leave blank to share the same list as the popup.

settings.label: Klaviyo List ID — Footer newsletter
settings.info: Optional separate list for footer email signups.

settings.label: Italic / highlighted word in heading
settings.info: This word will receive the hero italic colour

settings.label: Hero subtext
settings.default: Novel sensory products, monthly drops, immersive events and digital rituals for modern relationships.

settings.label: Hero background image
settings.info: 1920×1080px+ recommended

settings.label: Add to cart button hover background

settings.label: 404 heading
settings.default: Lost? Let's find your way back.

settings.label: 404 subtext

settings.label: Custom scripts in <head>
settings.info: Use with caution. For analytics, pixels, etc.

settings.label: Custom scripts before </body>
settings.info: Loaded last — least impact on page speed

settings.label: Age gate heading
settings.default: You must be 18 or over to enter this site.

settings.default: We use cookies to personalise your experience and analyse site traffic.

settings.label: Allergen notice text
